ItacPersonItem.Notes: Argoli joined the Ricovrati in 1633, he was medical doctor, astronomer, mathematician, and astrologist. Professor of mathematics at La Sapienza in Rome, and subsequently in Padua. He was one of many correspondents of the French Nicolas-Claude Fabri de Peiresc.See Peiresc, Lettres (1992). See his biography by Mario Gliozzi, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
